summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Auto Business Platform (BIBI Cars) - all backend APIs working correctly and frontend fully functional with successful login, navigation, and page loading
passed_tests: System Health API (GET /api/system/health) - returns healthy status
Auth Login API (POST /api/auth/login) - successful authentication with admin@crm.com
Parser Overview API (GET /api/ingestion/admin/parsers) - returns Copart and IAAI parsers
Parser Run API (POST /api/ingestion/admin/parsers/copart/run) - successfully starts parser
Vehicles List API (GET /api/vehicles?limit=5) - returns 5 test vehicles
Vehicles Stats API (GET /api/vehicles/stats) - returns complete statistics
Parser Health Overview API (GET /api/ingestion/admin/health) - working correctly
Frontend Login Page - BIBI Cars logo displayed correctly
Frontend Login Process - successful authentication and navigation
Frontend Dashboard - loads correctly with metrics and navigation
Frontend Vehicles Page - displays vehicle cards with images and prices (5 total, 3 Copart, 2 IAAI)
Frontend Parser Control Page - shows Copart and IAAI status with control buttons
Frontend Navigation - all pages accessible via direct URLs

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 10 required API endpoints working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - Login, dashboard, vehicles page, and parser control page all functional
